decision: Derive the app's default workspace basePath from the deploy instead of hardcoding ~/prj: precedence DAAX_DEFAULT_BASE_PATH > HOST_WORKSPACE_PATH (converted to ~/<basename>) > ~/prj. The committed repo default stays ~/prj; galway auto-derives ~/jarvis from its existing HOST_WORKSPACE_PATH=/home/jpoley/jarvis with no committed value and no deploy edit. Generalized lib/settings.ts expandPath container mapping to send the derived workspace root (plus legacy ~/prj) to /workspace, added a migration that upgrades a user's exact legacy default ~/prj to the host's derived default, and replaced the hardcoded 'prj' workspace-root label in the backlog project selector with the basename of the effective basePath.
rationale: Honors the operator's 'only for this host' requirement while keeping the PR host-agnostic. The container already mounts ~/jarvis->/workspace (DAAX_WORKSPACE/HOST_WORKSPACE_PATH), so the data plane was already correct; only hardcoded ~/prj literals and the 'prj' UI label were wrong. Server path resolvers already generalize via HOST_WORKSPACE_PATH, so a ~/jarvis basePath resolves to /workspace with no route changes.
alternatives: Hardcode ~/jarvis as the default for this host (rejected: makes committed code host-specific, breaking every other deployment which still expects ~/prj). Edit the deploy env to add DAAX_DEFAULT_BASE_PATH (unnecessary: HOST_WORKSPACE_PATH already supplies the derivation). Broad substring migration of any basePath containing 'prj' (rejected: would clobber deliberate paths like ~/prj/<subpath>; migration is scoped to the exact ~/prj string only).
